source_descriptor.operator_supplied_summary: Public-safe manual summary supplied by the operator.

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Validate a caller-provided manual summary without accepting unbounded material.
boundary_notes: Manual text summary uses bounded operator summary only.

source_descriptor.title_summary: Public URL ref with bounded summary

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Validate a public URL reference without fetching it.
boundary_notes: A public URL ref is not fetched by this runtime.
Source refs are lineage pointers, not proof.

source_descriptor.title_summary: Public URL ref without bounded summary

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Keep an accepted future-runtime reference candidate-only when summary is absent.
boundary_notes: candidate_only is not runtime execution approval.
A public URL ref is not fetched by this runtime.

redaction_notes: Repository file ref stays symbolic and is not read by this runtime.

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Require operator review for a repository file ref without a bounded summary.
boundary_notes: A repository file ref is not read by this runtime.

source_descriptor.title_summary: Uploaded file ref with missing locator
redaction_notes: Uploaded file locator is absent and the file is not read by this runtime.

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Require operator review for an uploaded file ref with no locator.
boundary_notes: An uploaded file ref is not read by this runtime.

source_descriptor.title_summary: Operator note ref with blocked raw payload placeholder
redaction_notes: raw source body blocked by contract fixture

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Block unbounded source material before runtime envelope creation.
boundary_notes: Raw source bodies must not be stored.

source_descriptor.source_locator: secret-like source locator blocked by contract fixture
source_descriptor.title_summary: Operator note ref with blocked sensitive placeholder
redaction_notes: secret-like source locator blocked by contract fixture

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Block sensitive locator placeholders before runtime acceptance.
boundary_notes: Sensitive locator placeholders are blocked or redacted.

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Validate review memory metadata as a symbolic source reference only.
boundary_notes: Source refs are lineage pointers, not proof.

requests.bounded_intake_purpose: Block an unsupported source kind without executing intake.
boundary_notes: Unknown source kinds require operator review.
blocked_request_not_executed remains a runtime decision reason.

bounded_summaries.bounded_summary: Public-safe bounded summary supplied by the caller for the URL reference.
Public-safe bounded summary of review memory metadata for intake review.

boundary_notes: Bounded Source Intake Runtime is bounded-runtime-only.
It processes caller-provided source descriptors and bounded summaries only.
Source refs are lineage pointers, not proof.
